---
title: "Country Analysis"
engine: python
---

## Introduction

This page analyzes changes in life expectancy, GDP per capita, and population over time for India using the Gapminder dataset.

```{python}
import pandas as pd
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

# Load dataset
df = pd.read_csv("gapminder.csv")

# Filter for India
country_df = df[df["country"] == "India"]

# Plot trends over time
plt.figure()

plt.plot(country_df["year"], country_df["life_expectancy"], label="Life Expectancy")
plt.plot(country_df["year"], country_df["gdp_per_capita"], label="GDP per Capita")
plt.plot(country_df["year"], country_df["population_millions"], label="Population (Millions)")

plt.xlabel("Year")
plt.title("India Over Time")
plt.legend()
plt.show()
